test_cases.title: Overpressure Protection Test
steps: Simulate cuff pressure exceeding 300 mmHg for longer than 3 seconds
test_cases.expected_result: Emergency deflation valve is triggered, cuff is vented within 2 seconds

test_cases.title: Error Code E3 Test
test_cases.expected_result: Device auto-deflates within 1.5 seconds and displays E3

test_cases.title: Audible Alarm Test for E3 Error
preconditions: Audible alarms are enabled in settings
test_cases.expected_result: Audible alarm sounds and E3 is displayed on the device

test_cases.title: Error Code E1 Test
test_cases.expected_result: Device aborts measurement and displays E1

test_cases.title: Silencing Audible Alarm Test
preconditions: Audible alarms are enabled in settings
steps: Disable audible alarm for E2 error in settings
test_cases.expected_result: Device aborts measurement, displays E2, and does not sound an audible alarm

test_cases.title: Overpressure Protection - Immediate Trigger
steps: Increase cuff pressure to exceed 299 mmHg
test_cases.expected_result: Emergency deflation valve triggers and cuff deflates within 2 seconds

test_cases.title: Overpressure Protection - Prolonged Exceedance
steps: Increase cuff pressure to exceed 300 mmHg for longer than 3 seconds
test_cases.expected_result: Emergency deflation valve triggers and cuff deflates within 2 seconds

test_cases.title: Overpressure Protection - Normal Operation
steps: Increase cuff pressure to 299 mmHg or less
test_cases.expected_result: Emergency deflation valve does not trigger and cuff continues to inflate

test_cases.title: Overpressure Protection - Sensor Fault
steps: Increase cuff pressure to exceed 300 mmHg for longer than 3 seconds
test_cases.expected_result: Emergency deflation valve triggers and cuff deflates within 2 seconds
